title: taraxacum huterianum
intro: Taraxacum huterianum is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its medicinal and edible properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum huterianum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum huterianum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also edible as a leafy green vegetable.
